Xi Zhen зҝ’зҸҚ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xi Zhen (зҝ’зҸҚ). A general for Shu, and died for Shu. Xi Zhen was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
